title: RevisionLog
description: Revision tracking log — records all revision rounds for a chapter. Supports the 5 revision modes.

revisions.description: Ordered list of revision rounds. Appended on each revision, never mutated (immutable log).

mode.description: Revision mode: polish (minor style fixes) | spot-fix (targeted issue resolution) | rewrite (major rework) | rework (structural change) | anti-detect (reduce AI traces).

beforeWordCount.description: Word count before this revision round.

afterWordCount.description: Word count after this revision round.

issuesAddressed.description: List of audit issue descriptions that this revision targeted.

remainingIssues.description: List of audit issues that remain after this revision round.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this revision was completed.
